query: SELECT id, hostName, cuisineStyle FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Chuan%' OR hostName LIKE '%Norika%' OR hostName LIKE '%Steven%' OR hostName LIKE '%Grace%' OR cuisineStyle LIKE '%dumpling%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT id, hostName, cuisineStyle FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Chuan%' OR hostName LIKE '%Norika%' OR hostName LIKE '%Steven%' OR hostName LIKE '%Grace%' OR cuisineStyle LIKE '%dumpling%';
